name: Global Skills Development Report
description: Composite development report drawing on ability, exercise, situational judgement, competency, 360 and personality data to summarise a candidate's skill profile.

name: .NET Framework 4.5
description: Multi-choice knowledge test covering core .NET Framework 4.5 concepts.

name: .NET MVC (New)
description: Multi-choice test measuring knowledge of the ASP.NET MVC framework.

name: .NET MVVM (New)
description: Multi-choice test measuring knowledge of the MVVM design pattern in .NET.

name: .NET WCF (New)
description: Multi-choice test measuring knowledge of Windows Communication Foundation (WCF).

name: .NET WPF (New)
description: Multi-choice test measuring knowledge of Windows Presentation Foundation (WPF).

name: .NET XAML (New)
description: Multi-choice test measuring knowledge of XAML markup used in .NET UI development.

name: Accounts Payable (New)
description: Multi-choice test measuring knowledge of accounts payable processes and procedures.

name: Accounts Payable Simulation (New)
description: Simulation-based assessment of accounts payable task execution in a realistic work sample.

name: Accounts Receivable (New)
description: Multi-choice test measuring knowledge of accounts receivable processes and procedures.

name: Accounts Receivable Simulation (New)
description: Simulation-based assessment of accounts receivable task execution in a realistic work sample.

name: ADO.NET (New)
description: Multi-choice test measuring knowledge of ADO.NET data access technology.

name: Adobe Experience Manager (New)
description: Multi-choice test measuring knowledge of Adobe Experience Manager (AEM) content management.

name: Adobe Photoshop CC
description: Multi-choice test measuring knowledge of Adobe Photoshop CC tools and workflows.

name: Aeronautical Engineering (New)
description: Multi-choice test measuring core aeronautical engineering knowledge.

name: Aerospace Engineering (New)
description: Multi-choice test measuring core aerospace engineering knowledge.

name: Agile Software Development
description: Multi-choice test measuring knowledge of Agile principles and software development practices.

name: Agile Testing (New)
description: Multi-choice test measuring knowledge of testing practices within Agile development.

name: AI Skills
description: Assessment of behavioural readiness and working style for roles that involve applying AI tools.

name: Amazon Web Services (AWS) Development (New)
description: Multi-choice test measuring knowledge of AWS development services and architecture.

name: Android Development (New)
description: Multi-choice test measuring knowledge of native Android application development.

name: Angular 6 (New)
description: Multi-choice test measuring knowledge of the Angular 6 front-end framework.

name: AngularJS (New)
description: Multi-choice test measuring knowledge of the AngularJS front-end framework.

name: Apache Hadoop (New)
description: Multi-choice test measuring knowledge of the Apache Hadoop big-data ecosystem.

name: Java 8 (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of Java class design, exceptions, generics, collections, concurrency, JDBC and Java I/O fundamentals.

name: Occupational Personality Questionnaire (OPQ32r)
description: Widely used measure of workplace behavioural style, giving HR professionals and managers a clear framework for understanding the impact of personality on job performance.

name: SHL Verify Interactive - Deductive Reasoning
description: Measures the ability to draw logical conclusions from given information, evaluate arguments, and complete scenarios using incomplete information.

name: SHL Verify Interactive - Inductive Reasoning
description: Evaluates the ability to identify patterns in data or situations and generalise that information to broader contexts.

name: SHL Verify Interactive Numerical Calculation
description: Adaptive test measuring the ability to perform numerical calculations and identify errors quickly and accurately; suited to entry-level roles.

name: SHL Verify Interactive - Numerical Reasoning
description: Assesses how well a candidate comprehends and reasons with numerical information presented in different formats.

name: Verify Interactive Ability Report
description: Combined report summarising results across the Verify Interactive suite of cognitive ability assessments.

name: Verify Interactive Process Monitoring
description: Cognitive assessment measuring the ability to respond to instrument feedback and monitor variations in a production process within safe control limits.
